{{Quote|Knowledge cannot be created; that is the stuff of heresy.|Yal Phaath|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]''</ref>}}
'''Yal Phaath''' was a [[Master Shaper]] of the [[Shaper caste]]. [[Ancient|Venerable]] even by the standards of his long-lived race, the marks of [[Domain Phaath]] had faded by the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] due to his many [[escalation]]s. He was also distinguished by the usual augmentations of his rank: two [[shaper hand]]s, and yellow [[mqaaq'it]] implants.

==Biography==
Charged by [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] with eliminating the ''[[Jeedai]]'' problem, Phaath initially worked in parallel with [[Mezhan Kwaad]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]; it was he who sent [[Initiate (Shaper)|Shaper Initiate]] [[Tsun Qel]] to discovering that she and her [[Shaper Adept|Adepts]] were practicing heresy. Before the heretics were rounded up, however, Yal Phaath was reassigned to [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]], where he began working on Shaping the [[vornskr]] into a truly deadly creature. The process was long and arduous, and resulted in many failures, partially because of the outdated nature of the [[Shaping protocol]]s, partially because of Phaath's determination to avoid any whisper of heresy in his work; but eventually, the Shapers succeeded in creating the [[voxyn]] in their [[damutek]] aboard the ''[[Baanu Rass]]''.

After [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] executed [[Ch'Gang Hool]] for being unable to control the [[World Brain]] on [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]], Phaath was placed in charge of the shaping of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]]. By the end of the war, [[Qelah Kwaad]] was the senior shaper on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], due to her success in creating the [[Slayers]].
